name: abab6.5
archDisplay: Mixture-of-Experts, trillion-scale total params (exact count/expert configuration undisclosed)
note: MiniMax's first trillion-parameter MoE LLM, targeting GPT-4/Claude-3-class performance at launch; the abab6.5s variant trades some quality for much higher throughput at the same 200K context.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real via MiniMax's own news post (minimax.io/news/abab65-series, dated 2024-04-17): 'Abab6.5 features a trillion parameters and supports a context length of 200k tokens; abab6.5s uses the same training techniques and data as abab6.5 but is more efficient.' Confirms MoE architecture, trillion-scale params (undisclosed exact count), 200K context, and the abab6.5/abab6.5s two-variant structure. Function calling/tool use confirmed generally supported by the MiniMax API (parallel function calling, tool selection) per MiniMax API docs. No results rows were present to verify. No changes made.
